steps.name: When User selects "Automation Project" from the Category dropdown
Then Only "Automation Project" courses should be displayed

description:
As an LMS user
  I want to filter the courses by category
  So that I can view courses of a selected category
fullName: lms_smartcliff:src/test/Features/Filter.feature#Verify filtering courses by Category dropdown displays only matching courses
